creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
This forum thread seems to indicate that it's mostly an Intel hardware  
issue.

This pfsense thread seems to have more details:

http://forum.pfsense.org/index.php?topic=3294.15

Xen must have worked around it because I can confirm that FreeBSD ISOs  
boot just fine on Xen 4.2 on Intel hardware.
